prevalence.source: European primary care respiratory infection syntheses

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical assessment with rapid antigen testing or culture to guide antibiotics

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Millions of episodes annually across EU
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with supportive care and targeted antibiotics

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Rapid strep testing commonly available in primary care
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Supportive care; penicillin for confirmed streptococcal pharyngitis
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Wide access to diagnostics and guideline-based care
